name: Black Bean Burritos
recipeIngredient: 16-oz can black beans, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat until hot.
2. Add onion, garlic, chili powder, and cumin. Cook, stirring occasionally, for 3 to 5 minutes until the onion is tender.
3. Stir in rice, black beans, and corn. Cook, stirring frequently, for 2 to 3 minutes until the mixture is thoroughly heated.
4. Remove from heat.
5. Spoon about half a cup of the rice mixture down the center of each tortilla.
6. Top each with two tablespoons cheese, one tablespoon green onion, and one tablespoon yogurt.
7. Roll up each tortilla tightly.
8. Top with one tablespoon salsa.
9. Makes 6 servings.
